0.response: {"Q0":"Not really, but I do recall repeating \"top or bottom\" in my head to note which galaxy I should choose and putting my eyes to where it'd show the arrow after the planet."}

7.response: {"Q0":"What would get a decent amount of money at a decent chance rather than taking chances for the biggest profit. "}

9.response: {"Q0":"Not at all, they were just really long. "}

5.response: {"Q0":"Only when I forgot they had left, but avoided it afterwards. "}

6.response: {"Q0":"No I didn't because that'd be a waste of gold. "}

8.response: {"Q0":"I don't think so, I was pretty balanced but the galaxy selection felt more stressful. "}

3.response: {"Q0":"Yes I did, I just forgot after the first time which was a mistake. "}

4.response: {"Q0":"Yes, I just have poor memory so took a while to remember."}

10.response: {"Q0":"No, everything popped up well and there was no lag."}

11.response: {"Q0":"I thought the visuals were cute and vibrant which was a surprise and made it feel more like a *real* game rather than an experiment. "}
